data.biography: Shunsuke Sakuya (咲野 俊介, Sakuya Shunsuke, May 20, 1965) is a Japanese voice actor and actor from Miyazaki prefecture who is affiliated with Seinenza Theater Company. He is 177 cm tall and weighs 61 kg. His blood type is A.
data.name: Shunsuke Sakuya

data.biography: Shunsuke Sakuya (咲野 俊介, Sakuya Shunsuke, 20 de mayo de 1965) es un seiyuu (actor de voz) y actor japonés de la prefectura de Miyazaki, Japón, que está afiliado a Seinenza Theater Company. Mide 177 cm y pesa 61 kg. Tiene grupo sanguíneo A.
data.name: Shunsuke Sakuya

data.biography:
Matsumura Yuki is a Japanese actor who has appeared in nine feature films, as well as a number of television series and theater productions. He is also a singer and has released eight albums and eight singles. He is represented with All-Stars Company.

Matsumura was born in Bunkyo, Tokyo. While attending Tokyo Metropolitan Itabashi High School, he made his debut with the role of Shigetoshi Okita in the television drama Seito Shokun!.

He had a role in the television series Shojo ga Otona ni naru Toki Sono Hosoki Michi broadcast in 1984. After that, he continued regular appearances on the television series Furyu Shojo to Yobarete and School Wars, and in the 1980s he worked as a regular actor of Daiei dramas. He also appeared on the television series Ponytail wa Furimukanai, Furyu Shojo to Yobarete and Chishimai, and 'Hanayomeisho wa Dare ga Kiru.

He made his music recording debut with CBS Sony in 1981. He has released eight albums and eight singles. His singing activities were paused for a while, but he resumed them in 2006 and has continued his live performances which are mainly in Tokyo and Osako.

He is a swordsmith and also a calligrapher. At the age of 30, he was apprenticed to Gyokukan Saotome and started writing. He received the Prime Minister's Prize at the 17th Tokyo Document Exhibition (sponsored by Tokyo Shimbun).
data.name: Yuki Matsumura

data.biography:
Stanley Weber is a French actor best known for playing Juan Borgia in the Borgia series. He is the son of actor Jacques Weber and Christine Weber, he has two brothers, Kim and Tommy Weber. In 2011, he joined the main cast of the French series Borgia where he played John Borgia, the son of Pope Alexander VI (John Doman), until 2013.

In 2013, he joined the cast of the film Not Another Happy Ending where he played Tom Duval.

In 2015, it was announced that Stanley would join the second season of the popular series Outlander where he will play the villain of the second season, Le Comte St. Germain, a wine merchant.

Il est le fils du comédien Jacques Weber.

Élève du Cours Florent en 2004, il entre au Conservatoire national supérieur d'art dramatique en 2008. Il est d'abord l'élève de Daniel Mesguich puis part en Angleterre pour suivre une année de formation à la London Academy of Music and Dramatic Art. Revenu en France, il intègre, pour sa troisième année de conservatoire, la classe de Jean-Damien Barbin.
data.name: Stanley Weber
スタンリー・ウェバー

data.biography: Megumi Urawa (born November 30, 1965) is a Japanese voice actress from Kashiwa, Chiba Prefecture. She is affiliated with Aoni Production. Urawa made her voice acting debut as Nyannyanchiagirl in Bikkuriman. Known for her boyish vocal tone, she often portrays young male characters in anime and video games, like child Roronoa Zoro from One Piece. Her vocal range spans from B to C. Outside of her career, Urawa enjoys cooking and gardening. She also holds a standard driver's license.
data.name: Megumi Urawa

data.biography: Megumi Urawa (nacida el 30 de noviembre de 1965) es una actriz de doblaje japonesa de Kashiwa, prefectura de Chiba. Está afiliada a Aoni Production. Urawa hizo su debut como actriz de voz como Nyannyanchiagirl en Bikkuriman. Conocida por su tono vocal juvenil, a menudo interpreta personajes masculinos jóvenes en anime y videojuegos, como la niña Roronoa Zoro de One Piece. Su rango vocal abarca de B a C. Fuera de su carrera, a Urawa le gusta cocinar y la jardinería.
data.name: Megumi Urawa

data.biography: A British-Italian Film Actress & TV Personality. Tosini was in 2 films that were promoting at Cannes Film Festival in 2023. Born in Nottingham, UK: Natasha spent her earlier years studying drama. In 2022 the internet went into meltdown with the news that 'Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey' was in production, and she starred as Lara in the viral sensation Jacuzzi scene. The movie went onto becoming the 2nd most anticipated movie of 2023; which resulted in a cinema release. In addition, Tosini was a cover model for FHM; the multinational men's lifestyle magazine.
data.name: Natasha Tosini

data.biography:
Ed Lauter ( October 30, 1938 – October 16, 2013) was an American actor. His films include The Last American Hero (1973), The Longest Yard (1974), King Kong (1976), Revenge of the Nerds II: Nerds in Paradise (1987),  School Ties (1992), True Romance (1993), Not Another Teen Movie (2001), Purple Heart (2005), Camille (2007), and A Modern Twain Story: The Prince and the Pauper(2007). Lauter's TV guest appearances include performances on Psych, The X-Files, Kojak, The A-Team, Booker, Charmed, Highlander: The Series, Star Trek: The Next Generation (as Lt. Cmdr. Albert in the season 5 episode "The First Duty"),The Equalizer and ER (with a recurring role as Fire Captain Dannaker).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Ed Lauter, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Ed Lauter

data.biography:
Ed Lauter (* 30. Oktober 1938 als Edward Matthew Lauter II in Long Beach, Long Island, New York; † 16. Oktober 2013 in Los Angeles) war ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Ed Lauter est un acteur américain né le 30 octobre 1938 à Long Beach (État de New York) et mort le 16 octobre 2013 à Los Angeles (Californie).

Ed Lauter pratique le basket-ball durant sa jeunesse. Il obtient une bourse afin d'étudier l'anglais à l'université de Long Island, dont il sort diplômé en 1961. Il intègre une école d'art dramatique, puis devient humoriste de stand-up. Il décroche un petit rôle dans une pièce de théâtre montée à Broadway en 1968.

L'acteur apparaît pour la première fois à l'écran en 1971 dans un épisode du feuilleton télévisé Mannix. Lauter joue des personnages secondaires durant toute sa carrière et tient fréquemment des rôles de «méchant» dans des séries policières américaines. Il tourne dans Kojak, L'Agence tous risques (The A-Team) ou encore Deux flics à Miami (Miami Vice). Dans les années 2000, il tient un rôle récurrent dans la série médicale Urgences (ER).

Au cinéma, il se fait connaître grâce à son rôle dans Plein la gueule (The Longest Yard) en 1974. Dans les années 1970, il tourne notamment dans Complot de famille (Family Plot) d'Alfred Hitchcock et le remake de King Kong produit par Dino De Laurentiis6. Il interprète le premier chauffeur de Peppy Miller (Bérénice Bejo) dans The Artist, sorti en 20111.

Ed Lauter est le cousin de la comédienne Elaine Stritch.

Atteint de mésothéliome, une forme rare de cancer, il décède le 16 octobre 2013 des suites de la maladie.

Source: Article "Ed Lauter" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

data.biography: Edward Matthew Lauter Jr (Long Beach, Nova York, 30 d’octubre de 1938 - Los Angeles, Califòrnia, 16 d’octubre de 2013), més conegut com a Ed Lauter, va ser un actor estatunidenc. Va aparèixer en més de 200 pel·lícules i episodis de sèries de televisió en una carrera que va abastar més de 40 anys.

Louis Jude "Lou" Ferrigno (born November 9, 1951) is an American actor, fitness trainer/consultant, and retired professional bodybuilder. As a bodybuilder, Ferrigno won an IFBB Mr. America title and two consecutive IFBB Mr. Universe titles, and appeared in the bodybuilding documentary Pumping Iron. As an actor, he is best known for portraying the title role in the CBS television series The Incredible Hulk. He has also appeared in European-produced fantasy-adventures such as Sinbad of the Seven Seas and Hercules, and as himself in the sitcom The King of Queens and the 2009 comedy I Love You, Man.
data.name: Lou Ferrigno

data.biography:
Louis Jude „Lou“ Ferrigno (* 9. November 1951 in Brooklyn, New York) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler und Bodybuilder italienischer Abstammung. Bekannt wurde er in der Titelrolle der Serie Der unglaubliche Hulk (1978–1982).

Mit drei Jahren wurde bei Ferrigno eine Mittelohrentzündung festgestellt, infolge derer er 80 % seines Hörvermögens verlor. Der Verlust seiner Hörkraft äußert sich auch in seiner schlechten Aussprache, derentwegen er als Kind häufig gehänselt wurde. Im Teenageralter begann er aufgrund dieser Hänseleien mit dem Bodybuilding, da er mit großen Muskeln diesen Makel überspielen wollte. Zu dieser Zeit war Ferrigno schlecht in der Schule, worauf sein Vater ihm ein Ultimatum stellte: Er müsse sich in der Schule verbessern oder er dürfe nicht weiter trainieren. Im Jahre 1969 beendete Ferrigno die Brooklyn Technical High School und konzentrierte sich ab dann auf seine Bodybuildingkarriere.

Er ist seit dem 3. Mai 1980 mit seiner Frau Carla verheiratet. Am 13. Juni 1981 kam ihre gemeinsame Tochter Shanna zur Welt. 1984 wurde dann der Sohn Louis Jr. und 1990 der Sohn Brent geboren.

Anfang der 1970er Jahre begann Ferrigno mit Bodybuildingwettbewerben. Er gewann 1971 den Pro Mr. America (WBBG) in der Teen-Kategorie und wechselte kurze Zeit später zur IFBB, bei der er 1973 Gesamtgewinner beim IFBB Mr. America wurde. 1975 wurde Ferrigno Dritter beim IFBB Mr. Olympia hinter Arnold Schwarzenegger (in dessen vorerst letztem Wettkampf) und Serge Nubret. Diese Niederlage veranlasste Ferrigno sich vom Wettkampf-Bodybuilding zurückzuziehen und sich einer Filmkarriere zu widmen.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Louis Jude Ferrigno est né dans une famille d'origine italienne à Brooklyn (New York). Son père Matty d'origine italienne était lieutenant de police et sa mère s'appelait Victoria. Peu de temps après sa naissance, Lou souffre de nombreuses infections aux oreilles. Alors qu'il est âgé de 3 ans, ses parents découvrent qu'il est sourd à 75-80 %. Dès l'âge de 13 ans, il s'exerce à la musculation afin de compenser son handicap par sa qualité physique1. Adulte, il mesure 1,94 m pour un poids de 145 kg. Toutefois, dans la préparation au titre de Mr. Olympia en 1975, il est homologué à 124,7 kg pour 1,95 m. Il arrive 3e derrière Serge Nubret et le vainqueur Arnold Schwarzenegger (cf. le film Pumping Iron sorti en 1977).

Louis Jude Ferrigno (New York, 1951. november 8. –) amerikai színész, testépítő.

Legismertebb alakítása Hulk A hihetetlen Hulk című sorozatban. A Herkules, a világ ura című filmben is szerepelt.

Родился 9 ноября 1952 года в Бруклине, США.

Американский актёр, бодибилдер.
data.name: Лу Ферриньо

data.biography: Louis Jude “Lou” Ferrigno（1951 年 11 月 9 日出生）是美国演员、健身教练/顾问和退休的职业健美运动员。作为一名健美运动员，费里尼奥赢得了IFBB美国先生的头衔和连续两次IFBB环球先生的头衔，并出现在健美纪录片《抽铁》中。作为一名演员，他最出名的是扮演 CBS 电视连续剧《不可思议的绿巨人》中的主角。他还出演了欧洲制作的奇幻冒险片，如《七海辛巴达》和《赫拉克勒斯》，并在情景喜剧《皇后之王》和 2009 年的喜剧《我爱你，伙计》中饰演自己。
data.name: 卢·费里诺

data.biography: Louis Jude “Lou” Ferrigno（1951 年 11 月 9 日出生）是美國演員、健身教練/顧問和退休的職業健美運動員。作為一名健美運動員，費裏尼奧贏得了 IFBB 美國先生的頭銜和聯續兩次 IFBB 環球先生的頭銜，並出現在健美紀錄片《抽鐵》中。作為一名演員，他最出名的是扮演 CBS 電視聯續劇《不可思議的綠巨人》中的主角。他還出演了歐洲製作的奇幻冒險片，如《七海辛巴達》和《赫拉克勒斯》，並在情景喜劇《皇后之王》和 2009 年的喜劇《我愛你，夥計》中飾演自己。
data.name: 盧·費裏諾

data.biography:
Louis Jude "Lou" Ferrigno, 9 Kasım 1951 tarihinde Brooklyn, New York, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. İtalyan-Amerikan bir ailenin çocuğu olan Ferrigno, henüz bebekken geçirdiği bir kulak enfeksiyonu nedeniyle işitme duyusunu büyük ölçüde kaybetmiştir. Bu durum, çocukluk yıllarında utangaç ve içine kapanık bir yapıya sahip olmasına neden oldu. Kendini savunmak ve daha güçlü olmak amacıyla 13 yaşında vücut geliştirme sporuna başladı. Steve Reeves gibi vücut geliştirme ikonlarından ilham alan Ferrigno, bu sporu bir tutku haline getirdi.

Disiplinli ve yoğun çalışmaları sonucunda 1970'lerin başında vücut geliştirme dünyasının en tanınan isimlerinden biri haline geldi. 1973'te IFBB Mr. America ve ardından IFBB Mr. Universe unvanlarını kazandı. 1974'te Mr. Universe unvanını koruyarak bu başarıyı üst üste iki kez elde eden tek kişi oldu. 1975 yılında, Arnold Schwarzenegger ile olan rekabetini konu alan ve vücut geliştirme sporunu geniş kitlelere tanıtan efsanevi belgesel "Pumping Iron"da yer aldı. Bu belgesel, onun hem sporcu kimliğini hem de kişiliğini gözler önüne sererek popülaritesini artırdı.

Vücut geliştirme kariyerindeki başarısı ve etkileyici fiziği, ona Hollywood'un kapılarını açtı. 1977 yılında, kariyerini ve hayatını tamamen değiştirecek olan bir rol için seçildi. CBS kanalında yayınlanan "The Incredible Hulk" (1977-1982) adlı televizyon dizisinde, Dr. David Banner'ın (Bill Bixby) öfkelendiğinde dönüştüğü yeşil dev Hulk karakterini canlandırdı. Neredeyse hiç diyalogu olmamasına rağmen, Ferrigno'nun canavar makyajı altındaki fiziksel performansı, karakterin hem korkutucu hem de trajik doğasını mükemmel bir şekilde yansıtmasını sağladı. Dizi dünya çapında büyük bir fenomen haline geldi ve Lou Ferrigno'nun adı, Hulk karakteriyle kalıcı olarak özdeşleşti. Dizi sona erdikten sonra da "The Incredible Hulk Returns" (1988), "The Trial of the Incredible Hulk" (1989) ve "The Death of the Incredible Hulk" (1990) gibi televizyon filmlerinde rolü tekrarladı.

"The Incredible Hulk" sonrası dönemde de oyunculuk kariyerine devam eden Ferrigno, 1983 yapımı "Herkül" (Hercules) ve devam filminde başrol oynadı. 2000'li yıllarda popüler komedi dizisi "The King of Queens"te kendisinin kurgusal bir versiyonunu canlandırarak komediye olan yatkınlığını da gösterdi.

Hulk karakteriyle olan bağı hiçbir zaman kopmadı. Marvel Sinema Evreni'ndeki "The Incredible Hulk" (2008), "The Avengers" (2012) ve "Avengers: Age of Ultron" (2015) gibi filmlerde Hulk karakterinin kükremeleri ve hırıltıları için seslendirme yaparak karaktere olan bağlılığını sürdürdü. Aynı zamanda kişisel antrenörlük ve motivasyon konuşmacılığı da yapan Ferrigno, fitness ve sağlık konularında ilham kaynağı olmaya devam etmektedir.
She is an actress and emcee under Change2561. After graduting from Triam Udom Suksa School, she went on to study at Chulalongkorn University's Faculty of Law.
data.name: Pimmada Chittieng

data.biography:
筒井道隆（本名相同，1971年3月31日-）是日本演员。出生于东京都调布市。堀越高中毕业。舞宣传所属。血型A型。父亲是武道家兼演员风间健。

1971年3月31日，作为拳击东洋中量级冠军风间健的长子出生。除此之外的私人生活虽然没有太多被谈论的机会，但小时候和妹妹一起看过吉卜力工作室的电影《萤火虫之墓》，讲述了嚎啕大哭的小故事，妹妹的存在变得明显。因为父亲是武道家，所以在高中时代也没有机会迎来反抗期。高中毕业后马上进入演艺事务所，之后不久就有了出演电影的工作，这部作品就是出道作品《巴塔阿西金鱼》。演员出道的契机是，父亲对我说“选择成为演员还是加入自卫队”，他本人打算在百货商店就职。

年轻的时候因为恋爱电视剧而备受瞩目，被称为“代表流行电视剧的演员之一”“流行演员之一”（特别是在《明日香白皮书》和《和你在一起的夏天》中博得偶像般的人气）。在面向年轻女性的杂志采访和写真中也经常出现。由于角色的影响，经常给人一种“受女性欢迎但优柔寡断的男性”的印象。

但是，被起用为三谷幸喜剧本作品，作品本身大受欢迎，也得到了“不可靠但不讨厌的好人”的角色，确立了喜剧路线。

在近年的电视剧中，警察（《男孩》、《大象》、《警视厅继续搜查班》等）中有创伤的人物的心理表现，在电影中，对自己在《KT》中的根源感到困惑的韩国人保镖在《我为了你才去死》中表现出了投身于不希望的战争的特攻兵等丰富的演技，另一方面，在出道作品《巴塔阿西金鱼》和电影《布莱斯·莱斯》中也饰演了直奔恋爱的开朗角色。

在舞台上的活跃也很多，从直接播放到音乐剧、时代剧等广泛的种类都有出演。

从稳健的声色来看，旁白业也在进行。

在采访中，筒井本人在现实生活中理想的男性形象是“内心坚强的人”。

2013年8月作为TEAM、托格的一员参加了自动路线阿尔卑斯山，出色地跑完了全程。（男子跑完全程449名选手中368位TEAM综合成绩在93TEAM中排名第75位）
data.name: 筒井道隆

data.biography:
筒井道隆（本名相同，1971 年 3 月 31 日-）是日本演員。出生於東京都調布市。堀越高中畢業。舞宣傳所屬。血型 A 型。父親是武道家兼演員風間健。

1971 年 3 月 31 日，作為拳擊東洋中量級冠軍風間健的長子出生。除此之外的私人生活雖然沒有太多被談論的機會，但小時候和妹妹一起看過吉卜力工作室的電影《再見螢火蟲》，講述了嚎啕大哭的小故事，妹妹的存在變得明顯。因為父親是武道家，所以在高中時代也沒有機會迎來反抗期。高中畢業後馬上進入演藝事務所，之後不久就有了出演電影的工作，這部作品就是出道作品《巴塔阿西金魚》。演員出道的契機是，父親對我説“選擇成為演員還是加入自衞隊”，他本人打算在百貨商店就職。

年輕的時候因為戀愛電視劇而備受矚目，被稱為“代表流行電視劇的演員之一”“流行演員之一”（特別是在《明日香白皮書》和《和你在一起的夏天》中博得偶像般的人氣）。在面向年輕女性的雜誌採訪和寫真中也經常出現。由於角色的影響，經常給人一種“受女性歡迎但優柔寡斷的男性”的印象。

但是，被起用為三谷幸喜劇本作品，作品本身大受歡迎，也得到了“不可靠但不討厭的好人”的角色，確立了喜劇路線。

在近年的電視劇中，警察（《男孩》、《永珍之家》、《警視廳繼續搜查班》等）中有創傷的人物的心理表現，在電影中，對自己在《KT》中的根源感到困惑的韓國人保鏢在《我為了你才去死》中表現出了投身於不希望的戰爭的特攻兵等豐富的演技，另一方面，在出道作品《巴塔阿西金魚》和電影《布萊斯·萊斯》中也飾演了直奔戀愛的開朗角色。

在舞台上的活躍也很多，從直接播放到音樂劇、時代劇等廣泛的種類都有出演。

從穩健的聲色來看，旁白業也在進行。

在採訪中，筒井本人在現實生活中理想的男性形象是“內心堅強的人”。

2013 年 8 月作為 TEAM、託格的一員參加了自動路線阿爾卑斯山，出色地跑完了全程。（男子跑完全程 449 名選手中 368 位 TEAM 綜合成績在 93TEAM 中排名第 75 位）
data.name: 筒井道隆

data.biography: Thomas Arnold is an actor, known for Thor - The Dark Kingdom (2013), Robin Hood(2010) and Der goldene Kompass (2007).
data.name: Thomas Arnold

data.biography:
Pete Thongchua is a Thai actor and race driver. He was born in California, USA, and is the oldest child of Pinyo Thongchua, a famous Thai actor, who later left acting and entered the business world. Pete also has three younger siblings: Nam Poung (Honey), Nam Thansod, and Saifar who are also well known in Thailand.  Puntakan P. Thongchua Jr. is the name in his birth certificate, “P” standing for Pete, from his dad’s nickname. Pete’s family moved back to Thailand when he was two years old.

Pete got into show business at a young age. By the age of 8-9, he was already the co-host of the show “Pao-Ying-shoob." At the age of 14, he was sent back to the United States, to further his education. However, during his visits back to Thailand, he continued to work in the entertainment business occasionally, so as to not be forgotten by his fans. Besides acting, Pete also likes to race cars and is well known in the car racing circuit.

Pete Thongchua has won the Mekhala award for Best Actor twice, in 1997 for the drama Sor Sam Sai and in 2000 for the drama Angkor.
data.name: Pete Thongchua

data.biography:
​From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.  

John Soursby Glover Jr. (born August 7, 1944) is an American actor, perhaps best known for a range of villainous roles in films and television, including Lionel Luthor on the Superman-inspired television series Smallville.
data.name: John Glover

data.biography:
John Glover (* 7. August 1944 in Salisbury in Maryland) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Glover absolvierte das Towson State Teacher’s College der Towson University, später nahm er Schauspielunterricht am Beverly Hills Playhouse. Im Jahr 1995 gewann er den Preis Tony Award für seine Rolle im Theaterstück Love! Valour! Compassion!, das 1997 verfilmt wurde. Zudem machte er sich ab 2001 durch die Rolle des Lionel Luthor in der Fernsehserie Smallville einen Namen.

Quelle: Wikipedia
John Soursby Glover Jr. (Kingston, New York, 7 d’agost de 1944) és un actor nord-americà, conegut per una sèrie de papers de dolent en pel·lícules i televisió.
小约翰·苏尔斯比·格洛弗（John Soursby Glover Jr.，1944 年 8 月 7 日出生）是一位美国演员
data.name: 约翰·格洛弗

data.biography: 小約翰·蘇爾斯比·格洛弗（John Soursby Glover Jr. ，1944 年 8 月 7 日出生）是一位美國演員
data.name: 約翰·格洛弗

data.biography: John Glover é um ator norte-americano de cinema, televisão e teatro, conhecido por sua habilidade em interpretar personagens carismáticos e, muitas vezes, vilanescos. Construiu uma carreira sólida a partir dos anos 1970, destacando-se em produções como Scrooged (1988), Gremlins 2: The New Batch (1990) e Batman & Robin (1997). Na televisão, alcançou grande popularidade ao viver Lionel Luthor na série Smallville (2001–2011), papel que lhe trouxe reconhecimento mundial. Além da TV e do cinema, Glover também é renomado no teatro, sendo vencedor do prêmio Tony por sua performance em Love! Valour! Compassion! (1995). Sua versatilidade o consolidou como um dos atores de caráter mais respeitados de sua geração.

data.name: ジョン・グローヴァー

data.biography:
John Soursby Glover Jr., 7 Ağustos 1944 tarihinde Kingston, New York'ta doğdu ve Salisbury, Maryland'de büyüdü. Babası bir televizyon satıcısıydı. Towson Üniversitesi'nde eğitim gördükten sonra oyunculuk kariyerine tiyatro sahnelerinde başlayan Glover, kariyerinin ilk yıllarında kendine has yüz hatları ve delici bakışları nedeniyle genellikle kötü adam rollerinde tercih edildi. Ancak zamanla hem dramatik derinliği hem de komedi yeteneğiyle karakter oyunculuğunun en saygın isimlerinden biri haline geldi. Sinemadaki ilk dikkat çekici işlerinden biri, "Julia" (1977) filmindeki rolüydü; ayrıca Woody Allen'ın "Annie Hall" (1977) filminde de küçük bir rol aldı.

Glover'ın sinemadaki asıl yükselişi 1980'lerde gerçekleşti. "52 Pick-Up" (1986) filmindeki psikopat şantajcı rolüyle eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı. Ancak onu popüler kültürün unutulmaz bir parçası yapan performanslarından biri, "Gremlins 2: The New Batch" (1990) filmindeki eksantrik milyarder Daniel Clamp karakteriydi. Bu rolle komedi yeteneğini sergileyen oyuncu, aynı yıl "RoboCop 2"de (1990) de yer aldı. Ayrıca Bill Murray ile başrolü paylaştığı "Scrooged" (1988) ve çılgın bilim insanı Dr. Jason Woodrue'yu canlandırdığı "Batman ve Robin" (1997) filmleriyle fantastik ve komedi türlerindeki başarısını sürdürdü. DC Evreni ile olan bağı sadece bu filmle sınırlı kalmadı; 1990'ların efsanevi çizgi dizisi "Batman: The Animated Series"te The Riddler (Bulmaca) karakterine sesiyle hayat verdi.

Televizyon dünyasında ise John Glover'ın kariyerini zirveye taşıyan ve onu yeni nesillere tanıtan yapım, Superman'in gençliğini anlatan uzun soluklu dizi "Smallville" (2001-2011) oldu. Dizide Lex Luthor'un acımasız, manipülatif ama bir o kadar da karmaşık babası Lionel Luthor'u canlandırdı. Başlangıçta konuk oyuncu olarak girdiği dizide, gösterdiği üstün performans sayesinde ana kadroya dahil edildi ve 7 sezon boyunca dizinin en kilit karakterlerinden biri oldu.

Sahne sanatlarına olan tutkusu hiç azalmayan Glover, Broadway'de de büyük başarılara imza attı. Terrence McNally'nin "Love! Valour! Compassion!" (1995) adlı oyununda canlandırdığı ikiz kardeşler rolüyle "En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu" dalında Tony Ödülü'nü kazandı. Kariyerinin sonraki yıllarında "Shazam!" (2019) filminde Dr. Sivana'nın babası rolüyle bir kez daha DC dünyasına döndü ve "Fear the Walking Dead" (2021) dizisinde tarikat lideri Teddy karakteriyle korku türündeki ustalığını konuşturdu. Glover, heykeltıraş Adam Kurtzman ile evlidir ve Alzheimer hastalığına karşı farkındalık yaratma konusundaki çalışmalarıyla da bilinir.

Zach Woods is an American actor and comedian. He is best known for his run as a series regular for three seasons on the NBC sitcom The Office, playing the role of Gabe Lewis, and his role as Jared Dunn on the HBO comedy series Silicon Valley. He also recurs on the HBO series Veep and on the USA Network sitcom Playing House, as well as the HBO show Avenue 5.
data.name: Zach Woods

data.biography: 扎克·伍兹是一位美国演员和喜剧演员。他最出名的是在NBC情景喜剧《办公室》中扮演三季的常规演员Gabe Lewis，以及在HBO喜剧《硅谷》中扮演Jared Dunn。他还在HBO电视剧《副总统》、美国电视网情景喜剧《玩过家家》以及HBO电视剧《第五大道》中出演。
紮克·伍茲是一位美國演員和喜劇演員。他最出名的是在 NBC 情景喜劇《辦公室》中扮演三季的常規演員 Gabe Lewis，以及在 HBO 喜劇《矽谷》中扮演 Jared Dunn。他還在 HBO 電視劇《副總統》、美國電視網情景喜劇《玩過家家》以及 HBO 電視劇《第五大道》中出演。
data.name: 紮克·伍茲

data.biography:
Annabelle Frances Wallis (born 5 September 1984) is an English actress. She is known for her roles as Jane Seymour in Showtime's period drama The Tudors, Grace Burgess in the BBC drama Peaky Blinders, Mia Form in the supernatural horror film Annabelle, Jenny Halsey in the supernatural adventure film The Mummy, Sandra in Silent Night, and Madison Mitchell in the horror film Malignant.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Annabelle Wallis, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Annabelle Wallis

data.biography:
Annabelle Frances Wallace, dite Annabelle Wallis, est une actrice britannique née le 5 septembre 1984 à Oxford (Angleterre).

Elle est notamment connue pour son interprétation de la reine consort d'Angleterre, Jeanne Seymour, dans la série historique Les Tudors ainsi que pour son rôle de Grace Burgess dans la série britannique Peaky Blinders.

Au cinéma, elle joue autant les rôles secondaires comme dans W.E., X-Men : Le Commencement, Grimsby : Agent trop spécial que les premiers rôles dans Annabelle, La Momie et Tag : Une règle, zéro limite.

Angielska aktorka urodzona 5 września 1984 roku w Oxfordzie. Rozpoznawalność przyniosła jej rola Jane Seymour w serialu "Dynastia Tudorów", w którym zastąpiła Anitę Briem. Można ją także oglądać w serialu "Peaky Blinders" oraz takich filmach, jak "Annabelle" i "Mumia". Płynnie posługuje się czterema językami: angielskim, portugalskim, francuskim i hiszpańskim.

Annabelle Frances Wallis (nascida em 5 de setembro de 1984) é uma atriz inglesa mais conhecida por seus papéis como Jane Seymour no drama de época da Showtime The Tudors, Bridget Pierce no drama da ABC Pan Am, Mia Form no filme de terror sobrenatural de 2014 Annabelle, Grace Burgess no O drama da BBC Peaky Blinders e Jenny Halsey no filme de ação de 2017, The Mummy.
Британская актриса, племянница актёра Ричарда Харриса
data.name: Аннабелль Уоллис

data.biography:
Annabelle Frances Wallis (nacida el 5 de septiembre de 1984) es una actriz inglesa mejor conocida por sus papeles de Jane Seymour en el drama de época de Showtime The Tudors, Bridget Pierce en el drama de ABC Pan Am, Mia Form en la película de terror sobrenatural de 2014 Annabelle, Grace Burgess en el El drama de la BBC Peaky Blinders y Jenny Halsey en la película de acción de 2017 The Mummy.

Descripción arriba del artículo de Wikipedia Annabelle Wallis, con licencia CC-BY-SA, lista completa de colaboradores en Wikipedia.

安娜贝拉·弗朗西斯·沃丽丝（Annabelle Frances Wallis），1984年9月5日生于英国英格兰牛津郡牛津，英国女演员。

2005年，参演宝莱坞爱情电影《跟随心声》，从而进入演艺圈。2008年，出演的动作电影《谎言之躯》上映。2009年，因参演的英国古装剧《都铎王朝第三季》而获得关注 [1]  。2013年，其主演的犯罪剧《浴血黑帮》开播 [2]  。2014年，主演恐怖片《安娜贝尔》 [3]  ，她因此入围第24届MTV电影大奖最佳惊骇表演奖 [4]  。2016年，参演的动作喜剧片《王牌贱谍：格林斯比》上映 [1]  。2017年，参演心理惊悚片《地雷险区》；同年，在动作冒险片《新木乃伊》中饰演女性考古专家珍妮 [5]  。2018年，主演喜剧电影《抓人游戏》 [6]  。2021年9月10日，主演的恐怖片《致命感应》上映。 [20]
data.name: 安娜贝拉·沃丽丝
アナベル・ウォーリス

data.biography: Annabelle Frances Wallis (nacida el 5 de septiembre de 1984) es una actriz inglesa mejor conocida por sus papeles de Jane Seymour en el drama de época de Showtime The Tudors, Bridget Pierce en el drama de ABC Pan Am, Mia Form en la película de terror sobrenatural de 2014 Annabelle, Grace Burgess en el El drama de la BBC Peaky Blinders y Jenny Halsey en la película de acción de 2017 The Mummy.

Annabelle Frances Wallis (Oxford, 1984. szeptember 25. –) angol színésznő.

Fontosabb televíziós szerepei voltak a Showtime Tudorok (2009–2010) és a BBC Birmingham bandája (2013–2019) című történelmi drámasorozataiban, valamint A legharsányabb hang (2019) című minisorozatban.

Filmes megjelenései közé tartozik az Annabelle (2014) című horrorfilm és A múmia (2017) című kalandfilm.
Аннабель Френсіс Волліс — англійська акторка, найбільш відома ролями в телесеріалах «Тюдори» та «Гострі картузи».
data.name: Аннабель Волліс

data.biography: Η Άναμπελ Γουόλις (Annabelle Wallis) είναι Αγγλίδα ηθοποιός. Είναι γνωστή για τους ρόλους της ως Jane Seymour στο δράμα εποχής του Showtime The Tudors (2009–2010), Grace Burgess στο δράμα του BBC Peaky Blinders (2013–2019), Mia Form στην υπερφυσική ταινία τρόμου Annabelle (2014), Jenny Halsey στην υπερφυσική ταινία περιπέτειας The Mummy (2017), Rebecca Crosby στο Tag (2018), Sandra στο Silent Night (2021) και Madison Mitchell στην ταινία τρόμου Malignant (2021).
data.name: Άναμπελ Γουόλις

data.biography:
安娜貝拉·弗朗西斯·沃麗絲（Annabelle Frances Wallis），1984 年 9 月 5 日生於英國英格蘭牛津郡牛津，英國女演員。

2005 年，參演寶萊塢愛情電影《跟隨心聲》，從而進入演藝圈。2008 年，出演的動作電影《叛諜同謀》上映。2009 年，因參演的英國古裝劇《都鐸王朝第三季》而獲得關注 。2013 年，其主演的犯罪劇《浴血黑幫》開播 。2014 年，主演恐怖片《詭娃安娜貝爾》 ，她因此入圍第 24 屆 MTV 電影大獎最佳驚駭表演獎 。2016 年，參演的動作喜劇片《王牌賤諜：格林斯比》上映 。2017 年，參演心理驚悚片《地雷險區》；同年，在動作冒險片《盜墓迷城 2017》中飾演女性考古專家珍妮 。2018 年，主演喜劇電影《捉依因同學會》 。2021 年 9 月 10 日，主演的恐怖片《惡煞》上映。
data.name: 安娜貝拉·沃麗絲

data.biography:
Annabelle Frances Wallis, 5 Eylül 1984 tarihinde Oxford, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Sinema dünyasının efsanevi isimlerinden Richard Harris'in yeğeni olan Wallis, çocukluk ve gençlik yıllarının büyük bir kısmını ailesiyle birlikte taşındığı Portekiz'de geçirdi. Bu uluslararası yetişme tarzı ve kültürel çeşitlilik sayesinde, ana dili İngilizce'nin yanı sıra akıcı bir şekilde Portekizce, Fransızca ve İspanyolca konuşabilmektedir. Lizbon'daki Saint Dominic's International School'da eğitim aldıktan sonra oyunculuk tutkusunun peşinden giderek Londra'ya taşındı ve burada kariyerine odaklandı.

Kariyerine oldukça sıra dışı bir başlangıç yaparak 2005 yapımı Bollywood filmi "Dil Jo Bhi Kahey..." ile kamera karşısına geçti. İngiltere ve Amerika pazarındaki ilk ciddi dikkat çekişi ise, tarihi drama dizisi "The Tudors"ın (2009-2010) üçüncü sezonunda Jane Seymour karakterini devralarak gerçekleştirdi. Bu rol, onun dönem dizilerindeki yeteneğini, zarafetini ve dramatik derinliğini kanıtlamasını sağladı. 2011 yılında "X-Men: Birinci Sınıf" (X-Men: First Class) ve Madonna'nın yönettiği "W.E." gibi yapımlarda küçük roller alsa da, onu dünya çapında bir televizyon yıldızı yapan proje BBC'nin fenomen dizisi "Peaky Blinders" (2013-2019) oldu. Dizide canlandırdığı gizemli İrlandalı barmen ve gizli ajan Grace Burgess karakteri, Cillian Murphy'nin canlandırdığı Thomas Shelby ile olan güçlü kimyası sayesinde izleyicilerin favorisi haline geldi.

Televizyondaki başarısını sinemaya da taşıyan Wallis, özellikle korku ve gerilim türündeki yapımlarla adından söz ettirdi. 2014 yapımı gişe rekortmeni korku filmi "Annabelle"de başrol oynayarak "Çığlık Kraliçesi" potansiyelini gösterdi. Ardından Hollywood'un büyük bütçeli yapımlarında yer almaya başladı; Tom Cruise ile başrolü paylaştığı 2017 yapımı "Mumya" (The Mummy) filminde arkeolog Jenny Halsey karakterine hayat verdi. Aynı yıl Guy Ritchie'nin yönettiği "Kral Arthur: Kılıç Efsanesi" (King Arthur: Legend of the Sword) filminde de rol aldı.

Oyunculuk yelpazesini genişletmeyi sürdüren Wallis, 2018 yapımı komedi filmi "Yakalandın!" (Tag) ile farklı türlerde de yetkin olduğunu kanıtladı. Russell Crowe ile birlikte rol aldığı "The Loudest Voice" (2019) mini dizisindeki performansıyla eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı. 2021 yılında, korku sinemasının ustası James Wan'ın yönettiği "Malignant" filminde Madison Mitchell karakterini canlandırarak türdeki başarısını perçinledi. Son dönemde ise "Silent Night" (2021) gibi kara mizah ve dram ağırlıklı yapımlarda ve bilimkurgu gerilim filmi "Warning" (2021) gibi projelerde yer alarak kariyerini çok yönlü bir şekilde sürdürmeye devam etmektedir. Moda dünyasıyla da yakın ilişkileri bulunan aktris, çeşitli lüks markaların marka elçiliğini de üstlenmiştir.
Annabelle Frances Wallis (Oxford, Oxfordshire, 5 de setembre de 1984) és una actriu anglesa.

Marcia Gay Harden (born August 14, 1959) is an American film and stage actress. She is the recipient of many accolades including an Academy Award and a Tony Award, in addition to nominations for a Critics' Choice Movie Award and three Primetime Emmy Awards.

She began her acting career appearing in television programs throughout the 1980s. In 1986, she appeared in her first film role, with her breakthrough coming in the 1990 Coen brothers-directed Miller's Crossing.

Her next notable film credits include The First Wives Club (1996), Flubber (1997), and Space Cowboys (2000). She received an Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for her role as Lee Krasner in Pollock (2000). She had a supporting role in  Mona Lisa Smile (2003). She received a second Academy Award nomination for her performance as Celeste Boyle in the drama film Mystic River (2003).

She appeared in several 2007 films, including Sean Penn's Into the Wild and Frank Darabont's The Mist, based on the novella by Stephen King. Also in 2007, she shared top billing with Kevin Bacon in Rails & Ties, the directorial debut of Alison Eastwood. Harden played a woman who has a mastectomy in Home (2008). (Her character in Rails & Ties also had a mastectomy.) One scene required her to bare her breasts, with the missing breast removed using computer-generated imagery. In Home, her co-stars include her daughter, Eulala Scheel.

In 2009, she had quite a busy year. She appeared as a regular on the FX series Damages as a shrewd corporate attorney opposite Glenn Close and William Hurt. She co-starred in the films Whip It, and The Maiden Heist. She returned to Broadway in Yasmina Reza's God of Carnage, co-starring with James Gandolfini, Hope Davis and Jeff Daniels. All three actors were nominated for a Tony Award; Harden won Best Actress in a Play. She received her first Primetime Emmy Award nomination for her role as FBI Special Agent Dana Lewis in the crime drama series Law & Order: Special Victims Unit, and earned a second Primetime Emmy Award nomination for her performance as Janina Krzyżanowska in the television film The Courageous Heart of Irena Sendler (2009).

She reunited with her former Broadway co-star Jeff Daniels as a new cast member on HBO's series The Newsroom in 2013. In 2015, she had a starring role in the medical drama Code Black. Her other notable television credits include ABC's How to Get Away with Murder and the Apple TV+ series The Morning Show.

She played Christian Grey's mother, Grace Trevelyan Grey, in the Fifty Shades film series from 2015 to 2018. She stars in the 2022 CBS drama So Help Me Todd.
data.name: Marcia Gay Harden

data.biography: 马西娅·盖伊·哈登，美国演员。她是那种天赋禀异、默默耕耘但却不能大红大紫的实力派演员。1980年在德克萨斯大学取得文学士学位，后又在纽约大学取得了艺术硕士学位。毕业之后，哈登在百老汇的戏剧舞台开始了她的表演生涯，并曾因《美国天使》一剧获得过戏剧表演的最高奖“托尼奖”的提名。在电视荧屏，哈登出演了92年轰动一时的系列剧《辛纳特拉》。在大银幕上，哈登的处女作是1990年由知名独立制片人科恩兄弟编导的《米勒倒戈》。哈登通往成功的路途是如此漫长，直到2000年她与艾德哈里斯一起出演了影片《波拉克》，在片中她饰演了画家波拉克的妻子，她的表演令人难忘，为此她赢得了奥斯卡最佳女配角和纽约电影奖最受欢迎女演员。2003年她又凭借影片《神秘河》中的出色表演再一次获得了奥斯卡奖的提名。2004年她出演了影片《爱你无条件》和《总统接招》，但这些都只是商业影片，并没有彰显出她的演技。2005年她出演了影片《少棒闯天下》。
data.name: 马西娅·盖伊·哈登

data.biography:
Marcia Gay Harden (* 14. August 1959 in San Diego, Kalifornien) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin und Oscarpreisträgerin.

Harden wurde in La Jolla geboren. Sie entstammt einer kinderreichen Familie. Sie studierte Theaterwissenschaften an der University of Texas at Austin und an der New York University (Tisch School of the Arts). Im Jahr 1993 spielte sie im Theaterstück Angels in America.

Seit ihrem Auftritt in Ethans und Joel Coens Mafia-Film Miller’s Crossing 1990 drehte sie bis zu ihrem Durchbruch zehn Jahre später mit Space Cowboys und Pollock neben Kino- auch Fernsehfilme. 2001 erhielt sie einen Oscar für Pollock, 2003 eine Oscar-Nominierung für Mystic River. Sie erhielt außerdem den Tony Awards 2009 als beste Hauptdarstellerin in dem Theaterstück Der Gott des Gemetzels.

Harden war von 1996 bis 2012 mit dem Requisiteur Thaddaeus Scheel verheiratet und hat drei Kinder.

Marcia Gay Harden (née le 14 août 1959) est une actrice américaine de cinéma et de théâtre. Le rôle décisif de Harden était dans The First Wives Club (1996), suivi de plusieurs rôles qui lui ont valu une renommée plus large, notamment la comédie à succès Flubber (1997) et Meet Joe Black (1998). Elle a reçu un Academy Award de la meilleure actrice dans un second rôle pour son rôle de Lee Krasner dans Pollock (2000). Elle a joué dans une série de films grand public et indépendants à succès, tels que Space Cowboys (2000), Into the Wild (2007) et The Mist (2007). Les crédits récents de Harden incluent le film de Lasse Hallstrom, The Hoax, en face de Richard Gere, et The Invisible de The Walt Disney Company, réalisé par David S Goyer. Elle a également été récemment vue dans The Dead Girl de Lakeshore Entertainment, réalisé par Karen Moncrief et avec Toni Colette, Kerry Washington, Mary Steenburgen et Brittany Murphy. En 2009, Harden a reçu un Tony Award pour la pièce de Broadway God of Carnage. Elle a été nominée deux fois pour un Emmy Award et le Screen Actors Guild Award.

Marcia Gay Harden (San Diego, 14 de agosto de 1959) é uma premiada atriz estadunidense vencedora do Oscar de melhor atriz (coadjuvante/secundária) por seu papel no filme Pollock, de 2000. Recebeu outra indicação ao prêmio, nesta mesma categoria, por Mystic River, de 2003. Em 2000, Harden ganharia o papel que a tornaria mais conhecida, Lee Krasner em Pollock. Por este papel, ela ganharia um Oscar de melhor atriz (coadjuvante/secundária). Ela também foi aclamada pela crítica nova-iorquina e ganharia o prêmio da NYFCC por sua participação no filme que contou, também, com participações de Ed Harris e Jennifer Connelly.

Η Μάρσα Γκέι Χάρντεν (Marcia Gay Harden) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός του κινηματογράφου και το θέατρου. Η Χάρντεν συμμετείχε στα ξεκινήματά της, το 1990, στην ταινία των Τζόελ και Ίθαν Κοέν Το πέρασμα του Μίλερ (Miller's Crossing) και έγινε ευρύτερα γνωστή με τη συμμετοχή της στην ταινία Κλαμπ χωρισμένων γυναικών (The First Wives Club), πλάι στις Μπέτι Μίντλερ, Ντάιαν Κίτον και Γκόλντι Χον τον οποίο ακολούθησαν και άλλοι ρόλοι με σημαντικότερους εκείνους στις ταινίες Φλάμπερ (Flubber, 1997) και Συνάντησε το Τζο Μπλάκ (Meet Joe Black, 1998) που την καθιέρωσαν ως καρατερίστα. Το 2000 τιμήθηκε με βραβείο Όσκαρ Β' γυναικείου ρόλου για την ταινία Πόλοκ, ο ασυμβίβαστος (Pollock, 2000), όπου υποδυόταν τη σύζυγο του ζωγράφου Τζάκσον Πόλοκ, Λι Κράσνερ. Το 2004 προτάθηκε ξανά για Όσκαρ Β΄ γυναικείου ρόλου για τη συμμετοχή της στην ταινία του Κλιντ Ίστγουντ Σκοτεινό Ποτάμι (Mystic River), όπου εμφανιζόταν πλάι στους Σον Πεν και Τιμ Ρόμπινς. Έχει πρωταγωνιστήσει σε μια σειρά από επιτυχημένες εμπορικές και ανεξάρτητες ταινίες, με σημαντικότερες το Space Cowboys του 2000, το Ταξίδι στην άγρια φύση (Into the Wild) του 2007, Η ομίχλη (The Mist) του 2007 και Κακά κορίτσια (Whip It, 2009) που σκηνοθέτησε η Ντρου Μπάριμορ. Πιο πρόσφατα συμμετείχε στην ταινία Πενήντα Αποχρώσεις του Γκρι (Fifty Shades of Grey, 2015)

Το 2009, η Χάρντεν έλαβε βραβείο Τόνι για τη θεατρική παράσταση God of Carnage και έχει προταθεί μια φορά για βραβείο Έμμυ και δύο φορές για βραβείο σωματείου ηθοποιών.
data.name: Μάρσα Γκέι Χάρντεν

data.biography: 馬西婭·蓋伊·哈登，美國演員。她是那種天賦稟異、默默耕耘但卻不能大紅大紫的實力派演員。1980 年在德克薩斯大學取得文學士學位，後又在紐約大學取得了藝術碩士學位。畢業之後，哈登在百老匯的戲劇舞台開始了她的表演生涯，並曾因《美國天使》一劇獲得過戲劇表演的最高獎“託尼獎”的提名。在電視熒屏，哈登出演了 92 年轟動一時的系列劇《辛納特拉》。在大銀幕上，哈登的處女作是 1990 年由知名獨立製片人科恩兄弟編導的《米勒倒戈》。哈登通往成功的路途是如此漫長，直到 2000 年她與艾德哈里斯一起出演了影片《波拉克》，在片中她飾演了畫家波拉克的妻子，她的表演令人難忘，為此她贏得了奧斯卡最佳女配角和紐約電影獎最受歡迎女演員。2003 年她又憑藉影片《懸河殺機》中的出色表演再一次獲得了奧斯卡獎的提名。2004 年她出演了影片《愛你無條件》和《總統接招》，但這些都只是商業影片，並沒有彰顯出她的演技。2005 年她出演了影片《少棒闖天下》。
data.name: 瑪西亞·蓋·哈登
